topSection.title: Threading technology into fashion
topSection.shortDesc: Transforming a legacy fashion export house with a tailor-made ERP ecosystem across R&D, sampling, and production.

challenges.shortInfo: Chanakya’s operations were hindered by outdated manual workflows and decentralised tracking:
lists: Swatches were tracked manually, often lost or unaccounted for.
Sample orders required 24–48 hour turnaround but had no unified system.
Production tracking lacked visibility into procurement and job order status.
Excel-based systems were prone to errors and inefficiencies.
challenges.background: To address Chanakya’s reliance on manual tracking and disconnected Excel sheets, we built a tailored ERP ecosystem covering research, sampling, and production. Our solutions were NEO, TRINITY, and MORPHEUS. A digitized swatch management system that streamlined rapid sampling orders, and introduced real-time visibility across the production cycle. By integrating smart search, QR-coded tracking, and actionable dashboards, we transformed their complex workflows into a seamless, efficient, and scalable digital process.

piSolution.details: Pi Techniques introduced a powerful, customized ERP system that was divided into three purpose-built applications

solutions.title: NEO
solutions.subTitle: (Swatch Management System)
list: Real-time swatch location across global offices and clients

solutions.title: TRINITY
solutions.subTitle: (Sampling Management System)
list: Manages sampling life cycle from order to invoicing
Central style repository with dynamic pricing

solutions.title: MORPHEUS
solutions.subTitle: (Production Management System)
list: Tracks procurement, job orders, delivery schedules

longTermImpact.title: Pi Techniques introduced a powerful, customized ERP system—divided into three purpose-built applications:

impact.title: Increased QA efficiency
impact.subTitle: Enhanced quality checks ensured consistent, error-free deliveries.

impact.title: Faster client response time
impact.subTitle: Swift access to data enabled quicker turnarounds and client updates.

impact.title: Cost-saving procurement
impact.subTitle: Smarter sourcing strategies reduced material costs and wastage.

impact.title: Optimized sampling life cycle
impact.subTitle: Streamlined processes cut delays and improved on-time sample delivery.

impact.title: 360° visibility with dashboards
impact.subTitle: Real-time reports gave leadership complete control over operations.

topSection.title:
Transforming fintech
publishing
topSection.shortDesc:
Building a secure, scalable digital platform that centralizes
premium fintech research, protects IP, and boosts subscription revenue.

challenges.shortInfo: IBS Intelligence offered high-value content such as the IBS Journal and Sales League Table but lacked a secure, unified platform for distribution. They needed to curb piracy, streamline digital access, and manage subscriptions efficiently—all while improving reach and monetization.
challenges.background: Pi Techniques designed and developed a centralized subscription-based eLibrary for IBS Intelligence. For the users this enabled instant access to premium fintech research, reports, and publications through a secure online store with integrated payment and preview capabilities.

piSolution.details: We created a fully functional subscription platform integrated with a scalable eLibrary, allowing users to browse, preview, and purchase digital content securely. The system also supported an events module for global fintech conferences, complete with advanced filtering by date, location, and topic. The implementation of online payments provided users immediate access to their purchases—eliminating delays and improving satisfaction.

keyFeature.feature: Secure eLibrary with 330+ reports and research
Online store with direct purchase & subscription options
Preview feature for journals and reports for quick access
WordPress and MySQL backend for easy content management

longTermImpact.title: A custom digital publishing platform from Pi Techniques helped the client scale reach, secure content, and strengthen their authority as a global fintech leader.

impact.title: Higher traffic
impact.subTitle: 45% increase in website visits within the first year.

impact.title: Revenue growth
impact.subTitle: Significant boost in subscription sales via the eLibrary.

impact.title: Brand authority
impact.subTitle: Reinforced position as a global fintech research leader.

impact.title: Faster delivery
impact.subTitle: Content turnaround reduced from days to seconds.

impact.title: Secure access
impact.subTitle: Piracy minimized with a centralized subscription model.

topSection.title: The strong and steady ERP evolution
topSection.shortDesc: Transforming a simple timesheet tracker into a decade-strong ERP that streamlines people, processes, projects, and payments for IT services.

challenges.shortInfo: CitiusTech originally needed a simple solution to track employee work hours. However, as the organization scaled, so did its operational complexity. Off-the-shelf ERP systems lacked the flexibility and customization needed for their domain-specific processes — from resource deployment to performance evaluations, and client invoicing to project-level profitability tracking.
challenges.background: We partnered with CitiusTech to build a scalable ERP platform from the ground up. Initially developed as a lightweight timesheet solution, the application has grown into a comprehensive enterprise suite tailored to IT services workflows. Built with .NET/C#, Entity Framework, and MSSQL, and extended to mobile platforms via Xamarin for Android and iOS, this platform now serves as the digital backbone of the client’s operations.

piSolution.details: We approached the problem with a modular, agile delivery model, progressively evolving the product through multiple sprints and deep client engagement. The result was a tailored ERP that integrates multiple functions, maintains scalability, supports compliance and quality workflows, and adapts easily to new business needs. Our development team, along with dedicated UX and database specialists, ensured seamless integration across features, devices, and departments.

longTermImpact.title: Through a tailored ERP solution, Pi Techniques enabled the client to gain efficiency, clarity, and agility—unlocking faster decisions and scalable growth.

impact.title: Operational efficiency boost
impact.subTitle: End-to-end ERP automation reduced manual interventions across HR, invoicing, and project tracking.

impact.title: Single source of truth
impact.subTitle: Centralized data repository improved accuracy and reduced duplication across departments.

impact.title: Scalable growth
impact.subTitle: Platform evolved alongside the client’s business without disruptive re-platforming.

impact.title: Faster decision-making
impact.subTitle: Real-time reporting and analytics empowered managers with actionable insights.

impact.title: Cross-platform accessibility
impact.subTitle: Seamless mobile access improved adoption and on-the-go productivity.

topSection.title: A premium, car rental management system
topSection.shortDesc: Powering 70+ Taj Hotels with a unified, luxury-grade car rental management system that streamlines bookings, fleet logistics, and guest service.

challenges.shortInfo: Taj Hotels was managing car rental operations using manual processes or disjointed systems, leading to inefficiencies in bookings, delays in driver assignments, lack of real-time tracking, and inconsistent billing practices across properties. They needed a unified platform that could work seamlessly across all hotel locations, without compromising on their premium service standards.
challenges.background: We implemented AutoSultan, Pi’s proprietary car rental management platform, as a plug-and-play solution across more than 70 Taj Hotel locations in India. The deployment included backend configuration, multi-location customization, and ongoing support.

piSolution.details: AutoSultan was customized and scaled to meet the nuanced operational needs of a luxury hospitality chain. The platform streamlined the entire car rental lifecycle — from fleet availability, automated bookings, scheduling, dispatching, to billing and reporting. Our engineering team ensured robust integration with Taj’s internal property management systems and compliance protocols. The implementation was carried out with zero disruption to ongoing hotel operations, with continual backend support provided by a cross-functional team.

keyFeature.feature: Multi-property centralized dashboard for car rental oversight
Real-time booking and dispatch scheduling system
Automated guest billing and GST-compliant invoicing
Reporting engine with daily, monthly, and fleet-wise insights
Scalable database architecture supporting future enhancements
UI optimized for concierge and logistics staff

longTermImpact.title: By automating operations, Pi Techniques helped the client speed up bookings, cut errors, and deliver a seamless guest experience across locations.

impact.title: Faster bookings
impact.subTitle: 40% quicker turnaround with automated scheduling.

impact.title: Error-free operations
impact.subTitle: 60% fewer manual errors in billing and dispatch.

impact.title: Consistent service
impact.subTitle: Standardized guest experience across 70+ hotels.

impact.title: Smarter visibility
impact.subTitle: Centralized dashboards for fleet and revenue insights.

impact.title: Future-ready
impact.subTitle: Scalable system to support growth and new locations.
